title: The midterms in motion
author: Halina Bennet
summary:
Midterm season is fully upon us, meaning that some things are becoming more clear while in other domains there is a real uptick in chaos. A late-night Trump endorsement may reshuffle the California governor’s race amid his new mail-in voting instructions, and fresh polling on “double haters” confirms the obvious — independents are not happy.

Read more
full_text: Midterm season is fully upon us, meaning that some things are becoming more clear while in other domains there is a real uptick in chaos. A late-night Trump endorsement may reshuffle the California governor’s race amid his new mail-in voting instructions, and fresh polling on “double haters” confirms the obvious — independents are not happy.
